overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along foggy train tracks on the outskirts of Saint Denis. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the tracks, and the character continues walking past a street sign in the misty, atmospheric morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy railway approach on town outskirts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the railway tracks through heavy morning fog

entered.detail: tall metal railway signal structure with ladder rungs on the left side of tracks
wooden utility poles with crossbars lining the left side of the railway
multiple parallel railway tracks with muddy ground between them
tall wooden plank fence running parallel to the tracks on the left
sparse deciduous trees visible through the fog on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along foggy railway tracks at dawn, passing a tall signal light pole. The environment is desolate and misty, with telegraph poles and a wooden fence lining the left side and scattered trees visible through the fog on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy railway approach on town outskirts

events.description: horse-drawn carriage emerges from the fog approaching on the tracks
carriage and mounted rider pass by on the right side of the tracks

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the tracks as the carriage approaches and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with white horses moving along the tracks and passing the character
mounted rider on horseback following behind the carriage

entered.detail: wooden carriage with two white horses and a driver emerging from the fog
rider on horseback following the carriage along the tracks

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn carriage emerges from the fog and approaches along the tracks, accompanied by a mounted rider. The character continues walking as the carriage passes by on the right, with the wooden fence and telegraph poles now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban railway crossing approaching Saint Denis

events.description: passing street sign reading SAINT DENIS ST mounted on a pole

agents.ego_description: walking past the street sign and continuing deeper into the foggy outskirts of town

entered.detail: street sign mounted on pole reading SAINT DENIS ST becoming visible ahead
large brick industrial building with multiple windows visible through the fog on the right

segments.scene_description: After the carriage passes, the character continues along the tracks approaching a street sign for SAINT DENIS ST. A large brick warehouse building becomes visible on the right through the fog, while the wooden fence runs closer to the path on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate railway at dawn that gradually reveals the industrial outskirts of a city. It begins with the character walking through dense morning mist past a tall signal light pole, with telegraph poles and a wooden fence lining the left side of the tracks. As the character progresses, a horse-drawn carriage and a mounted rider emerge from the fog and pass by on the right. The scene then shifts as the carriage disappears, leading the camera toward a street sign for Saint Denis St. before a large brick warehouse building slowly materializes through the haze on the right.
